requirements.requirement: When Party Mode prompts are assembled for multiple advisors, each advisor receives a differentiated analysis lens or framework, and tests verify advisors are not asked to perform the same role.

cases: [P0][5.4-BE-001][AC1] assigns differentiated analysis frameworks to advisor prompts and safe metadata
[P0][5.4-BE-005][AC1] deduplicates framework assignment within a Party Mode turn
[P0][5.4-FE-001][AC1,AC2] renders Party Mode advisor framework and integrated conclusion AI label

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: Covered through the existing session message path; no standalone Party Mode endpoint or page was added.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: Tenant/session and server-owned Party Mode state are inherited from Story 5.1/5.2/5.3 regression suites.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Framework deduplication and metadata privacy are covered by backend ATDD and frontend rendering tests.

requirements.requirement: When the user requests integration after multiple viewpoints, the system summarizes consensus, disagreements, risks, and next steps, while allowing follow-up questions before acceptance.

cases: [P0][5.4-BE-002][AC2] creates an AI-generated integrated conclusion covering consensus, disagreements, risks, and next steps
[P0][5.4-BE-004][AC2,AC3] rejects stale or forged Party Mode integration and accept decisions
[P0][5.4-BE-006][AC2] streams integration messages with started, delta, and completed events
[P0][5.4-FE-001][AC1,AC2] renders Party Mode advisor framework and integrated conclusion AI label

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: The existing submit and stream session message APIs are extended with server-owned decision actions and covered by service/stream tests.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: Latest-option and optional source message binding reject stale, forged, disabled, and non-latest actions before provider calls or persistence.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Stale integration target, partial stream ordering, and follow-up-before-accept controls are covered.

requirements.requirement: When the user accepts the integrated conclusion, Party Mode appends the conclusion to the active report draft and resumes the normal workflow.

cases: [P0][5.4-BE-003][AC3] accepts the integrated conclusion, appends it to the active draft, and returns to workflow
[P0][5.4-BE-004][AC2,AC3] rejects stale or forged Party Mode integration and accept decisions
[P0][5.4-BE-007][AC3] makes conclusion report append idempotent by source message id
[P0][5.4-FE-002][AC3] accepts integration from the clicked source message and refreshes the live document draft
Regression coverage for active output draft append/source validation
Regression coverage for session message lifecycle and provider stream handling
Regression coverage for message/stream controller behavior
Regression coverage for workspace decision and output refresh flows
Regression coverage for Party Mode stream parsing

heuristics.endpoint_coverage: Accept uses the existing session message decision path and the existing output append path; no browser-supplied report body is trusted.
heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: Accept validates latest decision action and the clicked source message id before append/return, with tenant/session validation inherited from output append.
heuristics.error_path_coverage: Stale accept, retry/idempotency, output refresh failure messaging, and normal return-to-workflow regression boundaries are covered.

recommendations.action: Keep Story 5.4 integration ATDD, output append, message/controller, workspace, and stream parser suites in the Epic 5 regression set.
